Board of Directors.name: Eng. Dr. Athuman R. Mfutakamba
Board of Directors.bio: Eng. Dr. Athuman R. Mfutakamba is an accomplished engineer, researcher, and public servant who previously served as the Deputy Minister for Transport in Tanzania. He holds a Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering from the University of Dar es Salaam, a Master of Science in Engineering from the University of Ottawa, and a PhD from Stanford University. Dr. Mfutakamba has extensive experience in infrastructure development, transport systems, engineering management, and policy leadership. Throughout his career, he has contributed significantly to national development through public service, engineering practice, and strategic project implementation. He is recognized for promoting sustainable transport solutions, innovation, and technology-driven development initiatives. In addition to his government leadership roles, he has actively supported research, mentorship, and institutional development. His professional interests include infrastructure modernization, engineering innovation, digital transformation, and sustainable socio-economic development through effective governance and strategic leadership.
